title: Justice beyond prosecution: The evolving role of the Enforcement Directorate
description: The recent judicial trajectory concerning the Enforcement Directorate (ED) signals more than routine adjudication. It marks a thoughtful recalibration in the architecture of economic offences jurisprudence.An institution once perceived largely through the prism of coercive authority now appears to be evolving towards a greater institutional role that balances statutory rigour with fairness and power with responsibility. This transition reflects not a dilution of enforcement, but its constitution
